name: Mint Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: butter and flour for greasing the pan
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together sugar, sifted cake flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add eggs, milk, canola oil, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
3. Stir in boiling water until smooth.
4. Grease a Bundt pan, 2 9-inch round baking pans, or a 13 x 9-inch baking pan with butter and flour.
5. Pour batter into prepared pans.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Remove cake from the pan and cool completely on the wire rack.
8. Just before serving, dust the top of the cake with confectioner's sugar. Garnish with mint flowers.
